realBrowserPilotLoginProof.detail: Pilot login toast succeeds but browser remains on /login with empty session storage keys.

backForwardNavbarProof.detail: Back/forward does not preserve authenticated shell visibility.

adminNavRouteClickProof.detail: Admin route clicks redirect to /login due to session collapse.

noLogoutOnNavClickProof.detail: Auth state collapses before route traversal can remain in-shell.

noAuthMe401StormProof.detail: No /auth/me retry storm pattern observed in sampled run.

mahirIsolationProof.detail: Real browser Mahir login unavailable without valid credential in-session.

ayhanAdminProof.detail: Real browser Ayhan login unavailable without valid credential in-session.

routeWiringAuditProof.detail: Route wiring runtime is partial under collapsed auth shell state.

appShellProof.detail: Authenticated app shell does not persist deterministically after login in live browser.

deploymentTruthProof.detail: At capture time, deployment alignment still lagged latest commit.
